inputs.label: Capital Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment and installation

inputs.label: Annual O&M Cost
inputs.businessContext: Annual fixed operation and maintenance costs

inputs.label: Annual Energy Production
inputs.businessContext: Annual net electricity output of the plant

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Discount rate reflecting cost of capital or hurdle rate

inputs.label: Project Lifetime
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational lifetime of the energy project

inputs.label: Decommissioning Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of dismantling and site restoration at end of project life

formulas.totalDiscountedCosts: capitalCost + decommissioningCost / Math.pow(1 + discountRate/100, projectLifetime) + annualOMCost * ((1 - Math.pow(1 + discountRate/100, -projectLifetime)) / (discountRate/100))
